title: Doneeta
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the ship|[[clan Doneeta]]}}
[[File:Triumph_and_Doneeta.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Doneeta'' and [[Triumph (Acclamator-class)|''Triumph'']] attack [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] starships during the [[Battle of Rendili]]]]

The '''''Doneeta''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] in use by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Near the end of the Wars, it, along with several other ''Acclamator''s, accompanied [[High Jedi General/Legends|High Generals]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] and [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] to the [[Rendili system/Legends|Rendili system]], where they would [[Battle of Rendili|prevent]] the defection of [[Rendili/Legends|Rendili's]] [[Rendili Home Defense Fleet|home fleet]].

The vessel eventually served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
